description: Warmup Stage 3 — Scene × SOP verification matrix
reference: SYSTEM_DESIGN.md §7.3 Stage 3, §5.10 主动触发工作流
convergence_criteria: System layer: all 4 scene behaviors correct + all SOP workflows trigger correctly + 5 consecutive tasks pass. Component layer: skill activation ≥80%, reviewer pass ≥85%, AI-flavor = 0, token ≤150% baseline.
automation: Full auto. Admin runs, reviewer evaluates, user not involved until final report.

checks.name: Skill activation sweep
checks.method: For each of 45 skills, issue 3 targeted prompts. Check Langfuse trace for skill_loaded=true. Threshold: ≥80% per skill.

checks.name: AI-flavor scan
checks.method: Run writer on 5 topics. Regex scan output for banned phrases (值得注意的是, 综上所述, it is worth noting, in conclusion, etc.). Threshold: 0 matches.

checks.name: Token baseline
checks.method: Run 10 representative steps. Record token usage per step type. Store as baseline for ≤150% check.

system_tests.title: Copilot: Build → Literature Mapping trigger
system_tests.description: Simulate completing a build cycle (tell copilot 'I just finished implementing the vector search module'). Verify copilot proactively suggests literature mapping without being asked.
system_tests.scene_check: copilot should SUGGEST, not DECIDE for the user. It should say 'want to do a literature mapping?' not 'I'm starting literature mapping now'.
pass_criteria: Copilot mentions literature mapping within 2 turns
Copilot asks user permission before starting (user-led scene)
No unsolicited action taken

system_tests.title: Copilot: Full research-to-publish cycle
system_tests.description: Request copilot to research LLM agent memory architectures, write a technical blog post, and publish to GitHub Gist.
system_tests.scene_check: Copilot takes direction from user, coordinates agents, reports progress. Does not make editorial decisions without user input.
pass_criteria: Research covers ≥5 recent papers with citations
Blog post has zero AI-flavor phrases
Reviewer passes on first or second attempt
GitHub Gist actually created
Copilot reports completion, doesn't decide next steps alone

system_tests.title: Mentor: Guided learning (not direct answers)
system_tests.description: Ask mentor 'teach me about Raft consensus'. Verify mentor creates a learning plan, gives assignments, and guides through understanding — does NOT just explain Raft directly.
system_tests.scene_check: Mentor GUIDES, not TELLS. Should ask questions, give hints, point to resources. Should NOT dump a complete explanation.
pass_criteria: Mentor asks what user already knows before teaching
Learning plan has progressive milestones
Includes hands-on assignment (not just reading)
Resources are tiered by depth
Mentor waits for user response at each checkpoint

system_tests.title: Mentor: Code review teaching
system_tests.description: Tell mentor 'I submitted a PR, can you help me review it?' Verify mentor teaches user HOW to review, not just does the review for them.
system_tests.scene_check: Mentor teaches methodology (3-pass method, comment tags), does not produce the review directly.
pass_criteria: Mentor explains review methodology before reviewing
Asks user to try reviewing a section first
Provides feedback on user's review attempt
Does not produce the final review comment for user to copy-paste

system_tests.title: Mentor: English correction post-hook
system_tests.description: Submit an English text with deliberate grammar errors to mentor. Verify LanguageTool check triggers and mentor explains error patterns.
system_tests.scene_check: Mentor explains WHY the errors are wrong, not just what the correction is.
pass_criteria: LanguageTool MCP called automatically
Errors identified with explanations of underlying grammar rules
Mentor tracks error pattern in Mem0 for future reference
Does not just return corrected text — teaches

system_tests.title: Coach: Proactive weekly plan
system_tests.description: Enter coach scene. Verify coach proactively generates a weekly plan without being asked, based on recent Strava/intervals.icu data.
system_tests.scene_check: Coach PLANS and PROPOSES, does not wait for user to ask. User executes.
pass_criteria: Coach presents plan within 2 turns of entering scene
Plan is based on recent data (not generic)
Coach sets quantitative targets
Coach does not ask 'what would you like to do?' — it tells

system_tests.title: Coach: Push strategy linked to exercise schedule
system_tests.description: Verify that daemon's push timing adapts to the user's exercise schedule (from interview §3: push should sync with coach-managed exercise plan).
system_tests.scene_check: Coach coordinates info push timing, not just exercise.
pass_criteria: Coach knows today's exercise schedule
Daily digest timing avoids exercise windows
Coach can explain why a particular time was chosen

system_tests.title: Operator: Autonomous daily digest
system_tests.description: Verify operator autonomously produces and pushes a daily digest to Telegram without user prompting. Check the digest is categorized by domain.
system_tests.scene_check: Operator ACTS autonomously. Does not ask for permission or confirmation.
pass_criteria: Digest appears in Telegram at scheduled time
Content categorized by domain (academic/industry/community)
No ask for user confirmation before sending
Operator reports summary in scene if user visits

system_tests.title: Operator: Self-heal without user intervention
system_tests.description: Simulate a container restart (docker restart daemon-langfuse-worker-1). Verify operator detects, diagnoses, and resolves without asking user.
system_tests.scene_check: Operator ACTS first, REPORTS after. Does not ask 'should I restart it?'
pass_criteria: Health check detects the issue within one cycle
Admin diagnoses root cause
Self-heal attempted automatically
User notified after resolution, not asked during

system_tests.title: Cross-scene: Build → Paper → Publish full cycle
system_tests.description: Full build-first cycle: tell copilot you built a new feature → copilot triggers lit mapping → researcher finds related work → writer drafts a short paper/blog → reviewer checks → publisher publishes to GitHub + cross-posts to Dev.to.
system_tests.scene_check: Copilot coordinates the full cycle, each agent plays its role correctly.
pass_criteria: Literature mapping triggered (SOP)
Researcher covers ≥5 papers
Writer output has zero AI-flavor
Writer output written to Obsidian vault (DD-81)
Reviewer passes with ≤2 iterations
Published to ≥1 external platform
Full cycle completes without user intervention after initial trigger
